enriched_points.expanded_content: Literary studies must reflect global narratives, incorporating diverse voices and perspectives to enrich analysis and foster understanding across cultures, as highlighted in contemporary scholarship.

Ensuring literature is accessible to all, including marginalized communities, is crucial. This includes creating platforms for underrepresented authors and reforming educational access within literary studies.

Building connections among diverse literary communities encourages collaboration and shared experiences, fostering a richer global literary landscape and promoting social justice initiatives through multicultural criticism.
